requirement_topic.zh: 海关清关——TRA（坦桑尼亚税务局）
requirement_topic.zht: 海關清關——TRA（坦桑尼亞稅務局）

summary.en: All wireless and telecommunications terminal equipment imported into Tanzania must be cleared through Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) customs procedures. This includes payment of applicable import duties, value-added tax (VAT), and any excise levies on electronic equipment under the Tanzania Customs and Excise Management Act and the East African Community Customs Management Act. The TCRA type approval certificate and TBS compliance documentation must be presented to TRA customs at the point of entry. The EAC Common External Tariff (CET) applies to imports from outside the EAC region, including China. Goods without a valid TCRA type approval certificate may be detained or refused entry at Tanzanian ports. TRA also administers the electronic cargo tracking system (ECTS) for transit goods.
summary.zh: 所有进口到坦桑尼亚的无线及电信终端设备须通过坦桑尼亚税务局（TRA）海关程序清关。这包括依据《坦桑尼亚海关和消费税管理法》及《东非共同体海关管理法》缴纳适用进口关税、增值税（VAT）及电子设备消费税。TCRA型式批准证书及TBS合规文件须在入境口岸提交给TRA海关。东非共同体共同对外关税（CET）适用于来自东非共同体以外地区（包括中国）的进口货物。没有有效TCRA型式批准证书的货物可能在坦桑尼亚港口被扣留或拒绝入境。TRA还管理过境货物的电子货物追踪系统（ECTS）。
summary.zht: 所有進口到坦桑尼亞的無線及電信終端設備須通過坦桑尼亞稅務局（TRA）海關程序清關。這包括依據《坦桑尼亞海關和消費稅管理法》及《東非共同體海關管理法》繳納適用進口關稅、增值稅（VAT）及電子設備消費稅。TCRA型式批准證書及TBS合規文件須在入境口岸提交給TRA海關。東非共同體共同對外關稅（CET）適用於來自東非共同體以外地區（包括中國）的進口貨物。沒有有效TCRA型式批准證書的貨物可能在坦桑尼亞港口被扣留或拒絕入境。TRA還管理過境貨物的電子貨物追蹤系統（ECTS）。

standards_or_laws: Tanzania Customs and Excise Management Act (Cap 403)
East African Community Customs Management Act (EACCMA) — EAC Common External Tariff
Electronic and Postal Communications Act (EPOCA) 2010 — customs presentation of TCRA certificate

summary.en: China has its own export customs procedures administered by the General Administration of Customs of China (GACC). Chinese exporters must file export declarations and obtain export licences where applicable for telecommunications and radio equipment. However, Chinese GACC export clearance procedures and SRRC/NAL/CCC certificates have no equivalence with Tanzanian TRA import customs requirements. Tanzania's EAC Common External Tariff rates and TRA import levies apply independently of China's export documentation.
summary.zh: 中国有由中国海关总署（GACC）管理的出口海关程序。中国出口商须申报出口，并在适用的情况下取得电信和无线电设备出口许可证。但是，中国海关总署出口清关程序及SRRC/NAL/CCC证书与坦桑尼亚TRA进口海关要求不具等同性。坦桑尼亚的东非共同体共同对外关税税率和TRA进口税费独立于中国出口文件适用。
summary.zht: 中國有由中國海關總署（GACC）管理的出口海關程序。中國出口商須申報出口，並在適用的情況下取得電信和無線電設備出口許可證。但是，中國海關總署出口清關程序及SRRC/NAL/CCC證書與坦桑尼亞TRA進口海關要求不具等同性。坦桑尼亞的東非共同體共同對外關稅稅率和TRA進口稅費獨立於中國出口文件適用。

standards_or_laws: China General Administration of Customs (GACC) — Export Declaration Procedures
China Export Licence for telecommunications and radio equipment (where applicable)

gap.en: Tanzania TRA import customs clearance is a separate obligation from TCRA type approval and TBS certification. The TCRA type approval certificate must be presented at the port of entry; goods without it may be detained. EAC Common External Tariff duties, VAT, and applicable levies on electronics are payable to TRA on importation from China. Chinese GACC export clearance does not substitute for TRA import clearance. The appointed Tanzanian importer or agent is typically responsible for TRA customs formalities.
gap.zh: 坦桑尼亚TRA进口海关清关是独立于TCRA型式批准和TBS认证之外的单独义务。TCRA型式批准证书须在入境口岸提交；没有证书的货物可能被扣留。从中国进口的电子产品须向TRA缴纳东非共同体共同对外关税、增值税及适用税费。中国海关总署出口清关不能替代TRA进口清关。所委任的坦桑尼亚进口商或代理通常负责TRA海关手续。
gap.zht: 坦桑尼亞TRA進口海關清關是獨立於TCRA型式批准和TBS認證之外的單獨義務。TCRA型式批准證書須在入境口岸提交；沒有證書的貨物可能被扣留。從中國進口的電子產品須向TRA繳納東非共同體共同對外關稅、增值稅及適用稅費。中國海關總署出口清關不能替代TRA進口清關。所委任的坦桑尼亞進口商或代理通常負責TRA海關手續。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] TRA customs clearance, including payment of EAC Common External Tariff duties and applicable VAT and levies, is mandatory for all wireless and telecommunications equipment imported into Tanzania from China. The TCRA type approval certificate must be presented at the port of entry. Chinese export documentation does not substitute for TRA import clearance. The Tanzanian importer or authorised agent is typically responsible for TRA customs formalities.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] TRA海关清关（包括缴纳东非共同体共同对外关税及适用增值税和税费）是从中国进口到坦桑尼亚的所有无线及电信设备的强制要求。TCRA型式批准证书须在入境口岸提交。中国出口文件不能替代TRA进口清关。坦桑尼亚进口商或授权代理通常负责TRA海关手续。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] TRA海關清關（包括繳納東非共同體共同對外關稅及適用增值稅和稅費）是從中國進口到坦桑尼亞的所有無線及電信設備的強制要求。TCRA型式批准證書須在入境口岸提交。中國出口文件不能替代TRA進口清關。坦桑尼亞進口商或授權代理通常負責TRA海關手續。
